slides.title: Steady blood sugar is linked to *slower aging*.
slides.sub: The goal is steadiness, not zero carbs. Here is how to smooth the spikes.

slides.title: Fewer big spikes
slides.body: Fewer sharp blood-sugar spikes *is linked to* slower metabolic aging. Steadier days seem to add up over time.

slides.title: Spikes cost you twice
slides.body: Sharp spikes drive *energy crashes now* and may raise long-term risk over the years. The dips feel real.

slides.title: Pair your carbs
slides.body: Pair carbs with protein, fiber and fat, and *eat vegetables first*. The same meal lands much more gently.

slides.title: Walk after meals
slides.body: A short walk after eating *blunts the spike*. Ten easy minutes does more than you would expect.

slides.title: Aim for steady
slides.body: The goal is *steadiness, not zero carbs*. Smoother, calmer energy through the day, not a strict ban.

slides.title: Track the steadiness that *adds years*.
slides.body: Vibe Health turns your food, movement and sleep into one daily score and plan, so steady days are easy to build.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
Steady blood sugar, with fewer big spikes, is linked to slower metabolic aging. 🥗

Pair carbs with protein, fiber and fat, eat your vegetables first, and take a short walk after meals. The goal is steadiness, not zero carbs. 🔖

Vibe Health turns it into one daily score and plan → link in bio.
